---
title: "Omar Lizardo"
about:
  template: jolla
  image: profile.jpg
  image-shape: round
  links:
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:olizardo@soc.ucla.edu
    - icon: google
      text: Google Scholar
      href: https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=Lt5nMNkAAAAJ&hl=en
    - icon: journal-bookmark-fill
      text: Semantic Scholar
      href: https://www.semanticscholar.org/author/Omar-Lizardo/2632398
    - icon: orcid
      text: ORCID
      href: https://orcid.org/0000-0002-5405-3007
---

{{< fa address-card size=large >}} I am the LeRoy Neiman Term Chair Professor of Sociology at the University of California, Los Angeles.

{{< fa chart-line size=large >}} I study culture, cognition, networks, theory, consumption, institutions, and organization.

{{< fa graduation-cap size=large >}} PhD in Sociology, *University of Arizona*, 2006.

{{< fa graduation-cap size=large >}} BS in Psychology, *Brooklyn College of the City University of New York*, 1997.

I am also:

{{< fa user-check >}} Current co-editor of the journal [*Sociological Theory*](https://journals.sagepub.com/home/stx), with [Z. Magubane](https://www.bc.edu/bc-web/schools/mcas/departments/sociology/people/faculty-directory/zine-magubane.html), [V. Patil](https://umbc.academia.edu/VrushaliPatil) and [S. L. Crawley](https://www.usf.edu/arts-sciences/departments/sociology/people/faculty/s-l-crawley.aspx/).

{{< fa user-check >}} Current chair of the American Sociological Association's [Section on Mathematical Sociology](https://mathematicalsociology.wordpress.com/).

{{< fa user-check >}} Former chair of the American Sociology Association's [Section on Sociology of Culture](https://asaculturesection.org/).

{{< fa user-check >}} Current member of the [Sociological Research Association](https://www.sociological-research-assoc.org/).

{{< fa user-check >}} Current member of the [Board of Reviewing Editors](https://www.science.org/content/page/editors-and-advisory-boards#board-of-reviewing-editors) of the journal [*Science*](https://www.science.org/journal/science).

{{< fa user-check >}} Current member of the Editorial Advisory Board of the journals [*Poetics*](https://www.sciencedirect.com/journal/poetics), [*Journal for the Theory of Social Behaviour*](https://onlinelibrary.wiley.com/journal/14685914), and [*Theory & Social Inquiry*](https://www.theoryandsocialinquiry.org/).

{{< fa user-check >}} Current member of the Editorial Advisory Board of the Stanford University Press Series on [Culture and Economic Life](https://www.sup.org/books/series/culture-and-economic-life), the Princeton University Press Series on [Studies in Cultural Sociology](https://press.princeton.edu/series/princeton-studies-in-cultural-sociology), and the Oxford University Press Series on [Social Network Mechanisms](http://www.oxfordsnmseries.com/).

{{< fa user-check >}} Former co-editor of [*American Sociological Review*](https://journals.sagepub.com/home/asr).
